selected.headline: World leaders warn WW3 could start within months as global tensions explode
selected.summary: Multiple world leaders are issuing stark warnings that a third world war could erupt within months as tensions between major powers reach a boiling point. NATO allies are on high alert, nuclear rhetoric is escalating, and everyday people are panic-buying survival kits.
selected.comedy_angle: Raven is fully prepared with a bunker list and 400 cans of beans while Jax just downloaded a new game and figures if WW3 starts he will deal with it then.
